title: BTE Ukraine modpack
description: Simple modpack for better builder experience on BTE Ukraine server
body:
This modpack is designed for the BTE Ukraine server and aims to enhance the building experience by providing convenience, performance, and extended capabilities for builders. The Fabric core is required for its operation.

The modpack is intended to optimize the game, provide essential tools for efficient construction for members of the Build The Earth: Ukraine project.

Included mods:

- Animatica
- Axiom
- Better Grassify
- BTEterrarenderer
- Capes
- Continuity
- Cubes Without Borders
- Debugify
- Dynamic fps
- Entityculling
- FabriShot
- Ferrite Core
- Immediately Fast
- Iris
- Konkrete
- Krypton
- Lamb Dynamic Lights
- Lithium
- Modmenu
- More Chat History
- More Culling
- NoChatReports
- OptiGUI
- Polytone
- Puzzle
- Reeses sodium options
- Remove Reloadng Screen
- SimpleRPC
- Skyboxify
- Sodium Extra
- Sodium
- Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks
- WorldEditCUI
- XaeroMiniMap
- XaeroWorldMap
- Zoomify
